message: Echo a compact summary of these symbols: []{}<>|~^`\ and emoji alpaca 🦙.

expected_prompt:
<|user|>
Echo a compact summary of these symbols: []{}<>|~^`\ and emoji alpaca 🦙.</s>
<|assistant|>
backend_text:
These symbols include:

- []: a set of parentheses
- {}: a set of curly brackets
- <>: an empty set
- |: a vertical bar
- ~: a tilde
- ^: a
